title: FirstJoinTeleport
description: A lightweight plugin that automatically teleports players to a custom spawn location the first time they join the server.
body:
# 🌍 FirstJoinTeleport

A lightweight plugin that **automatically teleports players to a custom spawn location** the first time they join the server.

---

## ✨ Features

- 📦 Easily set the spawn location with a simple command.  
- 🚀 Automatic teleportation on first join.  
- 🔄 Reload configuration without restarting the server.  
- 🧭 Supports world, coordinates, yaw, and pitch.  
- 🧩 Single-class plugin – clean and compact!  

---

## 🛠️ Commands

| Command                        | Description                                          | Permission               |
|-------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------|
| `/firstjointeleport set`      | Set your current location as the first join spawn   | `firstjointeleport.admin` |
| `/firstjointeleport reload`   | Reloads the `config.yml` configuration              | `firstjointeleport.admin` |
